claim_rows.claim: Approval requests show a 48-hour expiry badge, with actions disabled once expired
claim_rows.method: Inspect approval UI for an expiry badge; this is data-dependent (needs an approval near/past 48h) and may be UNVERIFIABLE-FROM-UI if no such live data exists

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named mobile-approval or mobile-approval_auth/mobile-approval_unauth or baseline/mobile-approval depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
